verses.1: In my distress I cried to the LORD, and He answered me.
verses.2: Deliver my soul, O LORD, from lying lips and a deceitful tongue.
verses.3: What will He do to you, and what will be added to you, O deceitful tongue?
verses.4: Sharp arrows will come from the warrior, with burning coals of the broom tree!
verses.5: Woe to me that I dwell in Meshech, that I live among the tents of Kedar!
verses.6: Too long have I dwelt among those who hate peace.
verses.7: I am in favor of peace; but when I speak, they want war.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
